word: H6069 - עַנְתֹתִי - ʻAnthôthîy - an-tho-thee' - Of Anathoth

sections.paragraph:
Original: ענּתותי ענתתי

Transliteration: ‛anthôthı̂y ‛annethôthı̂y

Phonetic: an-tho-thee'

BDB Definition:

Anethothite = see Anathoth " affliction"
  1. a descendant or inhabitant of Anathoth

Origin: from H6068

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
